title: Handle non-blocking event control to lvalue concatenation

features.name: non-blocking event control assignment to lvalue concatenation
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking assignment with event control where the lvalue is a concatenation of multiple signals

features.name: event control assignment with dynamic part select on array element
features.description: Code should include an event-controlled non-blocking assignment to an array element using a dynamic part select with +: operator
